svg.text: Minami province, Fox Clan lands — seat of County Magistrate Kitsune Tatsuya
Walled two-courtyard compound · main gate south

g.text: defendants kneel on the sand below the magistrate's dais
Fox-Fire Lantern brought to the dais at evening
· Tatsuya + family + senior retainers — residence wing
· junior bushi + standing ashigaru — south barracks
· cooks, grooms, servants — kitchen wing & stables
